page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: The dfam database is a collection of repetitive dna element sequence alignments, hidden markov models (hmms) and matches lists for complete eukaryote genomes
page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Dfam database is a open collection of Transposable Element DNA sequence alignments, hidden Markov Models (HMMs), consensus sequences, and genome annotations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Dfam database is a open collection of Transposable Element DNA sequence alignments, hidden Markov Models (HMMs), consensus sequences, and genome annotations.
